summary: Testing department and course delete functionality fixes. All backend endpoints pass (8/8 tests). Frontend delete modal working correctly - uses React Native Modal instead of Alert.alert, and error messages display properly in the modal.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend DELETE /api/departments correctly checks for students, teachers, and courses before allowing deletion
Backend DELETE /api/courses correctly checks for enrollments before allowing deletion
Frontend add-department.tsx properly implements Modal-based delete confirmation instead of Alert.alert
Frontend delete modal correctly displays backend error messages when deletion fails
data-testid attribute is present on delete buttons (data-testid='delete-dept-{id}')
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test department 'قسم اختبار للحذف' for deletion testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Department and course delete functionality is fully tested and working. Backend correctly blocks deletion when entities have associated data. Frontend properly shows Modal with error messages.

verified_features.Backend DELETE /api/departments with stu: PASS - Returns 400 with message about students
verified_features.Backend DELETE /api/departments with cou: PASS - Returns 400 with message about courses
verified_features.Backend DELETE /api/courses empty: PASS - Successfully deletes course without enrollments
verified_features.Frontend department page loads: PASS - Shows 4 departments with correct stats
verified_features.Frontend edit/delete buttons visible: PASS - Both buttons visible on each department card
verified_features.Frontend delete modal (not Alert.alert): PASS - Modal shows with warning icon, title, and buttons
verified_features.Frontend error message in modal: PASS - Error message 'لا يمكن حذف القسم - يوجد 4 طالب مرتبط' displayed in modal

rca_of_the_issue: The original issue was that department delete was using Alert.alert which doesn't work properly on web. The fix replaced Alert.alert with React Native Modal component, and the card structure was changed from single TouchableOpacity to View wrapper with separate clickable areas to prevent event propagation issues on web. Both fixes are confirmed working.
